hook: Friendship skill and dating skill overlap more than many men think.
body: Listening, initiating, following up, reading tone, and staying present all get trained in friendship too.

hook: Some men treat friendship as unrelated to attractiveness even while their social muscles are underdeveloped everywhere.
body: Better friendship habits often improve dating indirectly by making you more connected and socially fluid overall.

hook: Better friendship habits often improve dating indirectly by making you more connected and socially fluid overall.
body: A man who can create warmth and consistency with friends usually has more of the raw materials needed for healthy dating too.

body: Treat one friendship interaction this week as practice for the kind of relational man you want to become.
